message:
docs: Add Pi to supported agents

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/kdfoahf7gs9py3e7kwjkceb4

files.patch:
@@ -16,3 +16,7 @@ Select your AI coding assistant below to set up AgentLogs:
 <Card title="OpenCode" icon="/icons/opencode.svg" href="/agents/opencode" horizontal>
   Open-source AI coding assistant
 </Card>
+
+<Card title="Pi" icon="/icons/pi.svg" href="/agents/pi" horizontal>
+  Extensible coding agent harness
+</Card>

@@ -11,8 +11,8 @@ AgentLogs captures and analyzes transcripts from AI coding assistants, giving yo
 
 AgentLogs currently supports the following AI coding assistants:
 
-| Feature         | Claude Code | Codex | OpenCode |
-| --------------- | ----------- | ----- | -------- |
-| Transcripts     | ✓           | ✓     | ✓        |
-| Auto-sync       | ✓           | ✓     | ✓        |
-| Commit tracking | ✓           | —     | ✓        |
+| Feature         | Claude Code | Codex | OpenCode | Pi  |
+| --------------- | ----------- | ----- | -------- | --- |
+| Transcripts     | ✓           | ✓     | ✓        | ✓   |
+| Auto-sync       | ✓           | ✓     | ✓        | ✓   |
+| Commit tracking | ✓           | —     | ✓        | ✓   |
